title: brachyscome whitei subsp. whitei
intro: Brachyscome whitei subsp. whitei, also known as White's brachyscome, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family, native to Western Australia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Brachyscome whitei subsp. whitei include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate cold and flu symptoms, and support immune function. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used in topical applications for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects.
